ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Reserve
Off Calendar Nov-27-2019 Continued To May-12-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve And Liability Hold Back
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Erica Rosenblatt for (Administrator) Linda Ruth Garcia.

The Court asked counsel to explain the $40,000.00 reserve. Ms. Rosenblatt stated that they need to wait for the final letter from the IRS to know that there will not be an audit, that it will take until 2020, that some of the heirs are in Japan some are here and it would be hard to get the money back if necessary, that if the tax returns are audited they could be liable for $30,000.00 in taxes plus fees for the accountings and that she does not know if it will actually happen or not. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge:Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve And Liability Hold Back
Off Calendar Oct-16-2018 Continued To Oct-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve And Liability Hold Back
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Continued To Oct-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Erica Rosenblatt for Linda Garcia (Administrator)

Ms. Rosenblatt stated that the accountant advised the administrator to hold back the reserve until they get a closing letter from the IRS, over $1,000,000 has been distributed and she has heard no objections. The status on distribution of the reserve, etc. is continued to October 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If there is anything to report, Ms. Rosenblatt is to file something prior to the hearing date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve And Liability Hold Back

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-20-2016 Advanced From Apr-20-16 To Mar-30-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Erica Wilner Rosenblatt for (petitioner/administrator) Linda Garcia.

The Court stated that this petition seeks to add compensation for the administrator and attorney, that the court has to determine if the statutory compensation is sufficient and that it looks as if the supporting documentation was completed after the fact. Ms. Rosenblatt stated that she had no idea that she would have to put forward statutory hours and only had one day to do so. The Court stated that the petition was filed late and then time was shortened. Ms. Rosenblatt stated that they will save $30,000.00 in taxes if the fees can be paid by 3/31/16, that the brother would not sign the waiver of accounting until an accounting was done, that the amount of time that the client put in regarding statutory time was actually double what was listed, that the same is with the attorney's time, that the time in question was less than 12 hours and that the heirs in Japan were always contacted along the way. The Court stated it has concerns, that it is prepared to take the matter under submission and that the determination will be based on the quality of what has been presented. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
